params.SpellDescription: Goad target creature. (Until your next turn, that creature attacks each combat if able and attacks a player other than you if able.)

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Goad target creature. (Until your next turn, that creature attacks each combat if able and attacks a player other than you if able.)

params.TriggerDescription: Whenever you cast a historic spell, create a Treasure token. This ability triggers only once each turn. (Legendaries, artifacts, and Sagas are historic.)
